findings.text: Jaina knew that by the way the elf's shoulders changed before any sound reached human ears.
findings.deletionTest: The elf's shoulders changed before any sound reached human ears.
findings.reason: The sentence routes a visible cue through a filter verb even though the physical tell already carries the information.
findings.suggestedFix: Cyndia heard her first; the elf's shoulders changed before any sound reached human ears.

findings.povMismatch: The fragment captions Jaina's realization from outside instead of extending it through her concrete next thought.
findings.reason: Verdict-tag fragment functioning as a caption rather than an embodied in-POV assessment.

findings.text: The shape had already been there in the road, in the unfinished logic of the plague.
findings.missingPayload: The line avoids naming the concrete inference that the road and plague trail were already pointing north.
findings.reason: Placeholder nouns like shape and logic create analytical weight without cashing out into the actual directional claim.
findings.suggestedFix: She had already begun to read the road as north.

audits.cleanReason: No exchange in the chapter sets up a plain-speech or smaller-words translation request, so this guide had no eligible candidates.

summary.verdictReason: Pass B found 3 mild KILLs and no moderate or severe findings, so the chapter passes with warnings.
